commands.observed: RUN: plan-002-tests: cwd=. argv=['uv', 'run', 'pytest', 'tests/forkproof/forkpoints', '-q', '-m', 'not integration']; 8 passed, 1 deselected in 0.03s

RUN: integration-forkpoint: cwd=. argv=['uv', 'run', 'pytest', 'tests/forkproof/forkpoints', '-q', '-m', 'integration']; 1 passed, 8 deselected in 6.71s. This exports the real HUD trace boundary and runs a real Modal Filesystem Snapshot round-trip over task-relevant paths, but it is not final atomic capture of the historical source sandbox.
RUN: lint: cwd=. argv=['uv', 'run', 'ruff', 'check', 'docs/plans/scripts']; All checks passed!
PASS: 15 text file(s) are at most 500 lines
FAIL: 4 validation error(s): status must be complete, completed_at is required, complete manifest cannot have blockers, and commands[4] did not exit 0.

checks.name: Plan 002 command routing
checks.evidence: docs/plans/repo-map/COMMANDS.json now maps plan-002-tests and integration-forkpoint to verified pytest argv with PYTHONPATH=src under a narrow documented ownership exception.

checks.name: Six behavior cases
checks.evidence: tests/forkproof/forkpoints/test_core.py covers valid capture, valid restore, boundary mismatch, history mismatch, grader mismatch, unsupported mode, partial cleanup, and finalized-record immutability against the repo-native contract with a deterministic local provider.

checks.name: Integration readiness
checks.evidence: tests/forkproof/forkpoints/test_integration_readiness.py runs forkproof.forkpoints.integration_probe, which exports the accepted HUD trace into a redacted boundary summary, runs a real Modal Filesystem Snapshot round-trip over /app, /data/db, and /var/log/mongodb.log markers, and writes docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/integration-readiness.json.

checks.name: Real HUD/Modal ForkPoint completion
checks.evidence: Not complete: evidence now has a redacted HUD trace boundary export and a real Modal Filesystem Snapshot round-trip, but the accepted historical HUD trace has no live executable sandbox attached for atomic state capture at that exact completed-action boundary. Environment image digest and full branch security controls remain incomplete.

artifacts.description: Blocked Plan 002 evidence manifest recording the precondition failure and exact Done-when command observations.
Living-doc log updated with the Plan 002 STOP.
Plan 002 ForkPoint capture/restore contract, immutable JSON store, deterministic local snapshot provider, and integration-readiness command.
Behavior tests and integration-readiness test for the Plan 002 ForkPoint feature.
Integration-readiness artifact naming the local-provider ForkPoint id, Plan 003 handoff keys, and remaining real-system gaps.
Redacted accepted HUD trace export: event count, event-stream digests, selected final scenario-evaluate boundary, and hashed tail event metadata.
Real Modal Filesystem Snapshot round-trip over task-relevant marker paths with block_network, no secrets, resource labels, and prohibited mount checks.

skips.name: Atomic source-sandbox boundary capture
skips.reason: The accepted HUD trace can now be exported and redacted, but there is no provider handle to the live executable sandbox from that historical run, so executable state cannot be captured atomically at the selected trace boundary.

skips.name: Full branch security proof
skips.reason: The Modal probe records block_network, no secrets, resource labels, and prohibited mount checks for the filesystem round-trip sandbox; full adversarial branch isolation remains Plan 003-owned.

blockers.name: No live executable state for accepted historical boundary
blockers.evidence: docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/trace-boundary-summary.json proves the HUD trace can be exported and identifies the selected final boundary; docs/plans/evidence/002/artifacts/modal-filesystem-probe.json proves Modal Filesystem Snapshot can preserve task-relevant paths. They are not the same live sandbox transaction, so Plan 002 cannot honestly claim one atomic ForkPoint from the accepted historical source trace.
blockers.required_next_step: Run or re-run the accepted source trace through an orchestrator that pauses at the canonical completed-action boundary while retaining the Modal sandbox handle, then snapshot that live sandbox and verify restore fidelity before finalization.

notes: The previous COMMANDS.json start blocker is unblocked in this PR under a user-approved narrow ownership exception.
No final real ForkPoint, Modal snapshot, or restore fidelity completion claim is made from this in-progress manifest.
